reviews.review_description: I have had this game since release and it is F*CKING BEAUTIFUL it is TERRIFYING to play some missions I would say add a day and night mode BUT the devs are amazing at what they do graphics are SPLENDID sure it has its bugs and glitches a bit BUT its in DEVELOPMENT (for the little kids out there) it is peak for a game still in Development keep working on it PLEASE get a YouTube if you don’t Already so we can see future updates and leaks and it will attract more players also 10 DOLLARS its spectacular definitely worth it also don’t be scared like me in missions nothing bad happens unless you get shot

reviews.review_description:
Firstly I wanted to start of by saying that it’s one of the best VR games I have seen so far its really good and realistic.
I usually don’t write reviews but I have seen that the developers care and answer so I wanted to state my only concern which is the vest, it’s really good and amazing but it mostly doesn’t move with me when I turn so it would be really nice if you just make the vest basically stick to the player but other than that it’s a really amazing game

reviews.review_description: Had potential to be one of the best games but my god the amount of bugs this game has is horrendous. Its nearly unplayable. The game lags just from firing your gun, your guns lag sometimes you have multiple of the same gun for no reason. Your guns faze through walls, sandbox mode is basically unusable you control everything from a tiny iPad screen that shakes the whole time your grabbing it, the gunsmith is frustrating, risers disappear, you can't grab certain attachments with your left hand and cant grab it with your right without trying to grab it 10 times. Waves mode i got stuck in the ground off spawn 3 times. Theres plenty of $10 games that are full release and dont have bugs like this at all. Like that game idea and the features they were going for but this is a $3 game at most. When people were talking about this game they were all talking about the potential,  this game has had potential for a year and I can barely play the game.

Ive had this game for a9 while now and this game is wonderful. Seeing this game travel so far is amazing and the fact that it was made by one person is very suprising. Of course there is gonna be something wrong and for me i think all you need to fix is the performance and the ai. I get like 30 fps when i get on. I still love this game, this could probably compete with tavr if the ai was better and the ttk was better.

I love this game and I have a suggestion, Please consider adding a gun locker/weapon safe to the Home Invasion mode. It would make the mode feel more immersive and like your house is actually getting broken into and you aren't stuck with a Glock only either that or have a bedside ar. Otherwise great game for 10 bucks, just needs a bit better graphics and bug fixes and it would be 5 stars.

This game is a fantastic game the graphics are great the gun physics are gas the maps are open and difficult the only problem with the game is the multiplayer mode is a lil frustrating if it was like aim XR where you can just join friends a lot easier it would be great and make it easier to get someone onto thire knees to arrest them but other than that this game a a great game for $10

I played it since the early access and I’ve loved every bit of it my favorite mode to do is probably the hotel and it may be a little laggy but the graphics for a ten dollar game are amazing everything about this game is awesome it’s basically like ready or not but on vr plus it’s definitely cheaper then ready or not but it’s a really good game and I hope there’s more updates coming up

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! Of course more updates are coming stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
I got it when it first came out and Im honest I uninstalled it because the menus were not intuitive and very confusing. But WOW it got sooooo much better. The creativity is outstanding, love the SITUATIONS idea with TAC AIR, Intruder Alert, etc. it has this Ready or Not, SWAT vibe that people love. Keep the ideas coming!

And yes there are some janks here and there and some stuttering especially on larger maps, that will be hopefully further optimised.

Keep up the good work! Btw. is dismemberment hard to implement, where you shoot on limbs,  like in these known Zombie Shooters?

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! Glad you came back and gave it another shot! I am hesitant to add more gore/dismemberment after my other game red round got removed from the store for it. Maybe though in the future!

reviews.review_description: Would love to play so I can see for myself it it’s any good but the calibration instruction panel stays if front of my face!!! And when I press the menu button it flickers and overlays it.  Bug, most definitely. Anyone else having this issue?

developer_response.body: When you open the game the calibration menu should pop up and the selector beam comes out your hand. Put your hands out in front of you and then click the calibrate button. The menu should then no longer pop up.  If it continues then its likely that when you first opened the game you did not accept the read/write storage settings. If thats the case clear your app data or uninstall/reinstall and make sure to accept read/write storage settings otherwise it won't save your calibration data.

reviews.review_description: There are 7year olds saying how it’s “not realistic enough”. They just don’t get how it don’t have to be realistic like that. And also the people talking about the loading. Get over it. This game is great. The demo was ok… but the real game is amazing. Props to the owners. (You should make it mod-able) I’m back to editing this agin, you need to make a youtoube account. That’s how all these games get so popular, the game is amazing and has crazy potential.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review!! I have a youtube channel for Split Second I should post to it more often though you are correct!

reviews.review_title: Fantastic Ready or not type game
reviews.review_description: Not been in this for a while.  Got a brand new coat of paint but still a little janky but that doesn't stop it being enjoyable with lots of missions and customisation that can all be done solo. Great job

reviews.review_title: One of the best I've played.
reviews.review_description: Split Second is a great and amazing game. It's intense at times, but the bugs make it really funny as well. Very worth buying if you like police and SWAT sim games. The developer and mods are really helpful, responding to any questions you have. While it may seem like the dev doesn't update a lot, we all have to remember he is a solo dev that also has a life going on. If you hate the game, don't dog on it and compare it to TAVR. Give constructive criticism to how to improve the game based off your play through. But again, great game. You did a great job dev, I can't wait to see what the future has in store for this awesome game!

It’s early access so I understand that some parts will be tricky but if we pretend it’s a full release I’d say it’s alright. I like that there’s a backpack system with healing and bagging stuff. The door cam exists but evidently it doesn’t work yet. I like the the night vision. The gunplay is buttery smooth. Weapon functionality is very good. My only issue with it is the hand placement is a little gross and in the way. Ai could still use some tweaking. For an early access game like though it is very functional except the multiplayer. That’s seems a little bugged

- Height adjustment doesn't really work.
- Doors often not work correctly due to hand collision boxes
- Characters get stuck in animations
- Two major loading screens at launch just to get in
- Unnaturally dim/dark environment. Let me see!
- Has potential but brought down by extraordinary bad choices for design and function
so first i got a refund because the graphics looked bad, but when i decided to give it another try the graphics were beautiful, this game is also so fun to play. please keep making updates!

developer_response.body: Thank you for giving Split Second a second chance! Also, left controller meta menu button you can increase the pixel density and anti aliasing!

reviews.review_description: This is a reallllly good game. Recommended and also almost got my friend to buy a vr headset. I say almost cause of some things. The major issue me AND my friend had is that we are short... like 5'2 kind of short. And the npcs are SO much taller than us. If there was a way to add an npc height modifier then its a good idea to put it in. Another thing you should focus on is trying to add mod support. Would be very very good. With mods you could add diffrent attachments guns and even maps. Touching on the npc height thing thats not really necessary. You could add a setting to modify your characters height. Like set your real height and set your fake height. Disregarding those 2 things its basically perfect. Some kids say that its not realistic enough or that the loading takes too long. And i say that thats just stupid. The loading is NOT that long. And the game is realistic. Also a cool thkgn to add would be like more helicopter missions. Or an npc team to command kind of like in swat 4.

developer_response.body: Hey thank you for the review, yea height calibration etc will definitely be coming in a future update. Sorry for that! Speaking of helicopter missions try out TacAir in the situations tab you start off in a helicopter shooting down at a car running from the police. Also check out veiled village.  You start out by flying into the map.

reviews.review_description:
I like the concept the concept's cool. It's police SIM, you know, we all love one of those. I even like the mechanics of the guns. How they're weighted the virtual stock. All of that stuff I love. However, there are 3 main things to stick out to me. That just makes me absolutely rage. And the game itself and not in the good way. Number one is the fact that I don't think the hostage should be a negative point. Value, but instead should be a positive point. Value? Because the AI's will often be stacked in the one little room and so when you go in that room, one of the guys will go on the ground. The other four will shoot at you. So you do the responsible thing in light the room up. But you get points taken away. Because of the one guy there, 2, the level design. It's repetitive. It's boring.
And especially on that one stupid map, where you are, a soldier. There is nothing fun about it. It just makes you rage. Because a good level design would have for one have different terrain. It is all just the same 3 buildings retexured, 2, the AI's in that map are absolute dog water. My third point is the ais themselves.

 Ais will often for some reason be. Able to shoot through walls will detect you from half the map away. And as I stated, previously, there'll be in a massive room. So when you go in that room, you just die and Alas little tape hit, I wanna add-on here. I like the overall healing mechanic of the game where you have to bandage up bullet wounds. The problem, however, is that I want the game to be realistic. But not to the point that if I get shot in an arm I will bleed out within 3 seconds
It's also very finicky with the bandages. Because you will often bandage the wrong part when trying to bandage one part of your body. And sometimes it just won't register. 


Listen, these are all very fixable problems. And I'm sure you're on the works making the game better, and I believe this is an early access. I don't know I think so. Though if the game changes and it gets better, not even the ways I just thought you know I don't mind it. There are some problems but to this point. If I see genuine improvement in this game, I will change my review of but until that point it will remain at what I reviewed it as
Good job dev(s) the game is awesome I love the guns graphics ETC very fun if you want a game like a swat game then this game.e is for you

It's really a great game. The maps are brilliant the satanic hospital, the grocery store and the last afghan village really stood out to me.

You probably could do with adding some brighter maps like what you had in the demo. The others are quite dark.

The game is a bit buggy but they can all be fixed by just restarting the level. I like how it's just level based though so there is no rush to complete it.

Overall great game would recommend.

reviews.review_title: In my top 3 for close quarter combat
reviews.review_description:
Amazing game!!! Your adrenaline is triggered just approaching the buildings  because of how it feels and knowing the challenge that awaits you in identifying hostile from the innocent. It all has a unique feel of suspense and a bit of horror that sets you on edge. Excellent maps (although it’s still in development stage so some improvements needed on some maps like a couple of nighttime ones are very difficult even  with night vision). The gameplay definitely helps you build good reflexes. I die often at “normal” difficulty so I have much to improve and it’s a blast trying to!!!

It’s the game I look forward to playing every night.  

I hope the bHaptics is restored as it was lost at last update.

BEST TACTICAL SHOOTER?! 

So far, it’s not as far fetched as the first version of the game. 

So I’ve been following this game for a while. I assume it was dead after a while of no fixes. I uninstalled and forgot. Something told me to come back. Just to check it out. After all, it is a fun game. 

Coming back the first time, I noticed an announcement. The announcement stated that the game would still be getting updates which was great. For that time being, we’d be playing a new version of Split Second while the older version gets updates and up to par with the latest version made to the public. A solid announcement! 

The version of Split Second before this latest update was decent. Still buggy but good. Definitely a step in the right direction. I was expecting. Yet, it wasn’t enough to keep me playing. Knowing the game was getting worked on, I didn’t bash that version of the game. 

Fast forward to today, October 2025, the version of today’s Split Second is not only better than versions before it, but it capitalized on many additions to the game. New scopes, new map, firing range, better damage for NPC. Although it isn’t perfect, again, it is a very solid step in the right direction. To the dev making this, great job. Keep it up. If anyone is wondering if they should buy this, DO IT. Absolutely. It’s a great game. It will continue to get better.

reviews.review_description: This is not going to be a long review but this game is for sure on of my top 10 games. It gives me extreme ready or not vibes and is an overall enjoyable experience however I would love for community made maps to be a thing similar to ready or not.

Let me Start by saying i love this game, incredible amounts of fun with your random building generator and etc, there’s just a few things i’ve noticed. nothing that could really deter me from the game. Number 1 while in the mission office i’m able pick up the evidence bag but while in the missions (atleast the hotel one for me) it’s impossible to find or pick up the evidence back, i know it’s supposed to be around the arch of my back or something like that but it’s impossible lol atleast for me. second is while i love them, the guns feel repetitive, less engaging reloads, and we would love to be able to reload the shotgun! third, the tasers laser doesn’t work. once again no hate, this is an amazing game. it’s just..

I cant even actually play this game. I do not know wtf was supposed to happen, but after buying and booting up, I thought I was constantly kneeling.  After trying to find some form of a setting menu (never did), I realized I wasn't actually kneeling, but shrunk from the waste down.  I looked like I had the legs of a children's action figure with a real-life human torso.  Comically hilarious, and the best part of the game I experienced.

After realizing I could do nothing about this kneeling after restarting numerous times, I tried the tutorial.  Absolutely nothing to do but walk (crawl) around an empty hotel and staircases.  No enemies, no tutorial, nothing. Empty.

Everything about this game for me is either broken or doesn't work.  I dont get it

developer_response.body: There is obviously something very wrong with your install or something like your boundary needs to be reset. Feel free to join the discord and we can help work you thru this.

reviews.review_description:
Still in need of polish, but the kernel is there if you give it a chance. Really high-stakes rogue-light scenarios are a highlight. (You WILL learn to watch angles in night invasion!) Keep refining performance, polish, and depth but not by just adding more things-- focus on making each tool the best it can possibly be in handling, impact, fidelity, and the problems it solves and the problems it doesn't.

Developer is still putting work in; just needs refinement for five stars. I question the value of competing with multiplayer given the platform competition but a small mode exists.
Editors, can you make it so you can break the door open with your main gun like hit the stock on the handle and it opens. Everything else is fantastic

Review Update:  Since the new health system was updated game is now a must have! Thanks for listening to your audience!

Oh and the laser graphics too, can we like get a better laser and can we get the chance to change the color in the gunsmith and have 2 saved and the 2 is what we can use in the  game that would be cool. First off I want to say that I’ve been playing this game since the demo. I bought it when the game cost $2 and have occasionally hopped on since, watching the game progress. Split Second has come a long way, but if you compare ANY of the mechanics to other FPS games, it falls leagues behind.
Gun Play/Reloading:
The guns don’t feel awful, but they don’t feel satisfying at all. The ammo vest flat out doesn’t allow you to look down because of how large it is. If I try to look directly down, my head clips through the vest. For some reason on my quest 2 in this game, the rotation points for guns and magazines is off. I’ve talked to the dev about this previously and he hasn’t been able to find the issue. No other games I’ve played have had this issue, so it must be a game problem.
AI:
The AI are pretty rudimentary. There doesn’t seem to be animation between stances, which makes them look extremely low quality.
Models:
I don’t know if the gun models are actually made by the developer or not but they look really crusty and just not good. The gun models are also extremely complicated for some reason. Having just a regular old M4 isn’t a bad thing, you don’t have to have some crazy grip or handguard.
Missions:
All the missions feel very similar, and don’t really have any real uniqueness other than setting.

Overall I think it’s impressive what a solo dev has made. The crucial failure is a lack of polish.  Many indie games struggle with polish , but the ones that really succeed are the ones that polish profusely. Prioritize making the current game feel extremely good before adding more content .
Really fun, haven't played all missions yet or modes. Little glitchy sometimes but reset fixes it.
Just like ready or not and made by one dev is impressive.

Pros:
-Good Graphics
-Decent multi-player for it being really early 
-Good models/animations
-Good ambience and sounds
-Blood
-Great customization 
-Good voicelines

Cons:
-Pretty bad night vision interred 
-Clunky selection on the menu 
-Few gun customization 
-Shell ejection 

This game has so much potential and I can't wait for the future of it.

reviews.review_description: this game is PERFECT. however, the multiplayer lobby system is TERRIBLE. i cant join my friends or any lobby at the point for jack sh*t. please fix the multiplayer!

developer_response.body: Multiplayer is still experimental that's why I havent even put it on the listing on the store for the game. The lobbies are a max of 2 people and its pretty simple you click create to make a lobby then go back to that menu and you'll see green numbers that's your lobby code give those numbers to your friends. If they want to join you they simply type those numbers in and click join or click join on the lobby browser if the lobby appears after pressing the refresh button.

To get access switch to the RC channel. Hope this satisfies that itch until these modes get added to the new version.

Omds it’s so annoying when I’m looking around all over my body just to find a stupid bandage or a bag or whatever it’s in honestly i would rather chew metal for 12 hours then spend my money and play this game you can’t even heal in

At this point I just want a refund

developer_response.body: The healing has been heavily tested you are likely putting bandages on the wrong limbs. In the next update I am reversing the limbs on the tablet to help with the confusion. Sorry you are having a hard time.

reviews.review_description: This game is probably the best swat game on vr. It’s crazy good the surrenders realistic and it’s ten dollars, I don’t know who in the right mind would say no for some game of ai slop.
Hshwuqhw
The multiplayer barley works and its super buggy

I'm having a lot of fun with this game, witch is rare with VR these days. I love the shooting, the NPC's are great and the maps are fun. I just have one complete, the picking up evidence, I don't know if it's just me but getting guns off the ground can be a struggle sometimes, I just would like a crouch system or finding a different way around it. I love the game tho. That's my only complaint with it.

This game is fire I bough this game when it was around 2 dollars and it was great then to definitely recommend if you wanna feel like police 
🔥 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

reviews.review_description: Fun game to play multi-player but they need to optimize it the loading takes forever and it always says split second not responding
I love arresting people including in the club if yk
Its a good game but it won't let me play multiplayer and it takes a while to load in overall its a great game

i’ve had this game since it came out and it was perfectly good when it came out but then these new previous updates came and gave us disadvantages the bots lock on to you automatically and do not miss a single shot if they have a AR then ur cooked ur dead and the new tablet to look where you got hit has so many bugs i put my arm on my left part of my chest to grab it like it says and it won’t register 75% of the time died to blood loss because of that also trying to reload the pistols yea no the creator is forgetting people still play on quest/meta 2 and the  newest VR that comes out the game has many bugs takes extremely long to load in and laggy i go thru the floor unable to move and handcuffing also has bugs overall yea there’s plenty of bugs 10$ not worth it 2$ at most i would definitely play the game if they fixed all this but its just a ragebait game atp

developer_response.body: The new bandage system works its been tested by several users. It makes the game more challenging and that's what people are having a hard time with. The red circles on the tablet tell you which limb needs a bandage. Just like in real life you need to slow down and take your time so you don't get shot. The game takes a bit to load because its loading the shader files. Handcuffing make sure you grab their hands not their forearms when handcuffing and pull them down to their lower back. Years of work and time from myself has gone into making Split Second what it currently is. You can get hours of game time from spending less than what it cost for one meal from McDonald's I think that is more than fair. Take care feel free to join the discord im active in there and dont mind helping you figure things out.

reviews.review_description: Bought the game twice. First time around the game was still in early development. I liked the game but I couldnt play it due to the lag. So I decided to refund it. Second time I brought it, the lag was far worse. It was to the point that it was completely unplayable. Loads now took several minutes for a single mission. (even the smaller ones) Now, even though I have less than 2 hours of playtime, I can't refund due to my initial purchase being last year.
